zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabelle de Coucy於1202年出生在法國皮卡迪索姆波福斯時，她的父親Enguerrand II de Coucy48歲，母親Adèle de Nesle28歲。她於1214年5月與Nicolas V de Rumigny結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1263年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabelle de Coucy于1202年出生在法国皮卡迪索姆波福斯时，她的父亲Enguerrand II de Coucy48岁，母亲Adèle de Nesle28岁。她于1214年5月与Nicolas V de Rumigny结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1263年之后。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Coucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Arabic   Khoury   or   Khouri   ‘priest’. Compare   Courey  ,   Couri  , and   Cury  .
French: habitational name from a place so named in Vienne.

variants.name: Khoury
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Nabil, Sami, Samir, Issa, Ibrahim, Ramzi, Bassam, Fouad, Habib, Issam, Jamil, Riad.  French Michel, Antoine, Emile, Pierre, Andre, Camille, Clemence, Clovis, Georges, Gisele, Henri, Jacques.

Arabic (mainly Lebanon, Syria, and Jordan): from khūrī ‘priest’, in particular a Christian priest. This surname is used among Christians, including Assyrians/Chaldeans. Compare Cory , Coury , Cury , Elkhoury , Khouri , Kory , Koury , and Kury .

nameMeanings.name: Isabelle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isabel
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabelle de Coucy was born in 1202, in Boves, Somme, Picardie, France, her father, Enguerrand II de Coucy, was 48 and her mother, Adèle de Nesle, was 28. She married Nicolas V de Rumigny in May 1214. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. She died after 1263.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabelle de Coucy est née en 1202, à Boves, Somme, Picardie, France, son père, Enguerrand II de Coucy, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Adèle de Nesle, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Nicolas V de Rumigny en mai 1214. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée après 1263.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabelle de Coucy 1202 in Boves, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Enguerrand II de Coucy 48 und ihre Mutter Adèle de Nesle 28. Sie hat im Mai 1214 Nicolas V de Rumigny geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1263.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle de Coucy è nata il nel 1202 nel Boves, Somme, Picardie, Francia, sua padre, Enguerrand II de Coucy, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Adèle de Nesle, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Nicolas V de Rumigny nel maggio 1214. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì dopo il 1263.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Coucyが1202年にフランスピカーディソンメボベスで生まれた時，父Enguerrand II de Coucyは48歳，母Adèle de Nesleは28歳であった。1214年5月にNicolas V de Rumignyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1263年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Coucy(이)가 1202년 프랑스 피카디 솜 보브스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Enguerrand II de Coucy(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adèle de Nesle(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1214년 5월 Nicolas V de Rumigny(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1263년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle de Coucy nasceu em 1202, em Boves, Somme, Picardie, França, seu pai, Enguerrand II de Coucy, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Adèle de Nesle, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Nicolas V de Rumigny em maio de 1214. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1263.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabelle de Coucy родилась в 1202 г. в местности бовесь, сомм, пикарди, Франция, её отцу по имени Enguerrand II de Coucy было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Adèle de Nesle, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicolas V de Rumigny май 1214 г. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла после 1263 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabelle de Coucy nació en 1202, en Boves, Somme, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Enguerrand II de Coucy, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Adèle de Nesle, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Nicolas V de Rumigny en mayo de 1214. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió después de 1263.
